mapper.sql: id, task_id, column_name, column_code, is_null, regular, remark, is_pk, data_id, data_name, data_code, status
mapper.insert: insert into VzDataQuality.dbo.tb_collectionrule (id, task_id, column_name, column_code, is_null, regular, remark, is_pk, data_id, data_name, data_code, status ) values (#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{task_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column_name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column_code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{is_null,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regular,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{is_pk,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{data_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{data_name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{data_code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update:
update VzDataQuality.dbo.tb_collectionrule
task_id=#{rule.task_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
column_name = #{rule.column_name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
column_code = #{rule.column_code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_null = #{rule.is_null,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
regular = #{rule.regular,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{rule.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
is_pk = #{rule.is_pk,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
data_id = #{rule.data_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
data_name = #{rule.data_name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
data_code = #{rule.data_code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{rule.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{rule.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
select m1.id,m1.task_id,m1.column_name,m1.column_code,m1.is_null,m1.regular,m1.remark,m1.is_pk, m1.data_id,m1.data_name,m1.data_code,m1.status,m2.Id id2,m2.Name name,m2.Identifier,m2.Version, m2.RegistrationAuthority,m2.RelatedEnvironment,m2.BaseDictId,m2.CreateTime,m2.UpdateTime,m2.CreateUserId, m2.UpdateUserId,m2.Sort,m2.Status status2,m2.DataElementClassifyId,m2.DataElementType,m2.Define, m2.DataType,m2.DataLength,m2.DataFormat,m2.AllowDataValue,m2.Level level2 from VzDataQuality.dbo.tb_collectionrule m1 left join VzDataQuality.dbo.DataElements m2 on m1.data_id=m2.id where m1.task_id=#{task_id}
and (m1.column_name like '%' + #{name} + '%' or m1.column_code like '%' + #{name} + '%')
SELECT top 1 * FROM BIDESGIN.DBO.TB_RegexConfigure where code=#{code}

select Id as id,Name as name,CreateTime,UpdateTime,CreateUserId,UpdateUserId,Sort,Status,Identifier,Level,pId='0' from VzDataQuality.dbo.DataElementClassifies where Status=1
and name like CONCAT('%',#{name},'%')

select Id as id,Name as name,Identifier,Version,RegistrationAuthority,RelatedEnvironment,BaseDictId,CreateTime,UpdateTime,CreateUserId,UpdateUserId,Sort,Status, DataElementClassifyId as pId,DataElementType,Define,DataType,DataLength,DataFormat,AllowDataValue,Level from VzDataQuality.dbo.DataElements where Status=1
and name like CONCAT('%',#{name},'%')
